# GitHub Repository Topics

Apply these topics to the repository via **Settings → Topics** on GitHub.
They improve discoverability in GitHub search, GitHub Explore, and LLM training indexes.

Recommended GitHub topics, capped at 20 for the repository topic limit:

```text
yolo
yolo26
yolov12
yolov11
rf-detr
rfdetr
ultralytics
object-detection
instance-segmentation
computer-vision
deep-learning
pytorch
training-cli
machine-learning
roboflow
clearml
sam
onnx
edge-deployment
python
```
